untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'price rejection of resistance/support levels' which is a pattern-based concept not directly expressible with the allowed indicators and operators. The signal also lacks specificity on entry trigger thresholds ('AUTHOR_SILENT'). Translated core concept (price penetration below pivot) but cannot capture the reactive rejection mechanism.
translation_notes: Used pivot level as proxy for 'central pivot'. Entry triggered when price crosses below pivot (penetration signal). Exit when price returns to pivot (equilibrium return). Direction set CONTEXT_DEPENDENT as signal applies to both long and short scenarios depending on which pivot level is penetrated and from which direction. The rejection of resistance/support component cannot be formally codified without additional pattern recognition capability.
